comment: Version-controlled query set. Edit per-vault so 'rare' actually matches and 'phrase' actually exists. Re-running with the same set is what makes results comparable across snapshots and adapters.

queries.notes: Top tag in vault — #leadership with 156 occurrences.
Top tag #team-dynamics with 112 occurrences; realistic two-word search.
Common phrase from top tag #deep-work (164 occurrences) and book highlights.
Specific project name — low hit count, stresses cold-cache and near-zero payload path.

reads._hint: After running `harness profile`, paste a small (~2 KB) and large (>50 KB) note path from vault-stats.json here. Leave null to auto-pick from the stats file.

_runsHint: N≥20 per the build brief. Increase for noisier numbers; decrease only when iterating.
